hero.title: Start your dog's care plan
hero.intro: Tell us what you need and we will guide you to the right service pathway.

steps.title: Step 1: Choose your service
steps.text: Select daycare, grooming, hydrotherapy, or a combined care plan.

steps.title: Step 2: Share your dog's details
steps.text: Provide age, breed, temperament, and any health notes so we can tailor recommendations.

steps.title: Step 3: Confirm your appointment
steps.text: Our team confirms availability and provides your booking time and preparation guidance.
